name: union_map_list_value_try_cast
description: M3d over-claim GUARD (cold-review F2): union map<string,list<int>> | map<string,list<string>> with {"u":{"a":["1"]}}. try_cast_map recursively try_casts each value: the first map's value try_cast fails (list<int> rejects the string "1"), the second map's value try_casts at score 0, so the second map wins -> {"a":["1"]}. Native tryCastMap now recurses into list-valued map values via tryCastArray. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
